comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Planning refinement: Ralph capability schema should account for system-managed loop control tools (`ralph_continue`, `ralph_finish`) separately from user-configurable active tools, or enforce them as non-removable during validation. Skills remain out of scope.

comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Oracle review accepted: make the Ralph capability contract versioned, keep skills absent, make tool names the single authority for Ralph tool policy, and keep ralph_continue/ralph_finish system-managed rather than normal user-configurable active tools.
